rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 Октоїха, 3 мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мчч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. мчч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар мчч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мчч. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і мчч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний мчч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря мчч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. мчч.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – мчч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 1 Сол. 271 зач.; 5, 1-8. Єв. – Лк. 62 зач.; 11, 47 – 12, 1.

troparion_en.text: Your holy martyrs, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion_en.text: You are numbered among the hosts of martyrs / for you were illustrious in mighty contests. / Galaction, together with Episteme your faithful wife and companion in struggle, / unceasingly intercede to the one God for us all.

matched_oca_saint: Martyrs Galaction and his wife, Epistemis, at Emesa

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Galaction and his wife, Epistemis, at Emesa

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text: You are numbered among the hosts of martyrs / for you were illustrious in mighty contests. / Galaction, together with Episteme your faithful wife and companion in struggle, / unceasingly intercede to the one God for us all.

oca_saints.name: Repose of Saint Jonah, Archbishop of Novgorod

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Jonah, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Apostles Patrobus, Hermes, Linus, Gaius, and Philologus, of the Seventy

troparion.text: Holy Apostles Patrobus, Hermes, Linus, Gaius, and Philologus, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, / O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, / you defended the Faith, even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Gregory entreat Christ God to save our souls.
